Oil Shortage Pain Begins for Asia
headlines.summary: Asian economies are starting to feel the first serious effects of the oil and gas export paralysis in the Persian Gulf, with economic growth stuttering and likely to deteriorate over the coming months. headlines.title: Fujairah in Focus as Oil Flows Reroute Around Hormuz Crisis
headlines.summary: As the Strait of Hormuz has now been closed for nearly nine weeks, the oil hub at Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) has become an even more prominent oil export and bunkering hub than it has ever been. headlines.title: U.S. Fuel Exports Hit Record High as Hormuz Crisis Reshapes Global Energy Flows
headlines.summary: US oil product exports surged to a record 8.2 million barrels per day last week as countries scrambled to replace fuel supplies disrupted by the Hormuz crisis, according to Bloomberg reporting, which noted that diesel exports led the increase and reached an all-time high.Countrie

headlines.title: Germany Seeks Israeli Jet Fuel As Hormuz Disruptions Cripple Airlines

headlines.title: British Billionaire Slams Europe's Energy Policy and Expands U.S. Oil Business
headlines.summary: Europe and the UK’s approach to energy policy is “all over the place” and eroding the region’s security and growth prospects, Jim Ratcliffe has said in an announcement confirming Ineos’s plans to expand its oil and gas operations in the Gulf of Mexico. headlines.title: EIA: US Crude Oil Inventories Continue to Fall
headlines.summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States decreased by 2.3 million barrels during the week ending May 1, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday. headlines.title: Lufthansa Warns Strait of Hormuz Closure Will Add $2 Billion in Fuel Costs
headlines.summary: Lufthansa Group expects the surge in jet fuel prices to cost it an additional $2 billion this year as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz “is leading to a shortage in kerosene supply and thus to a significant increase in kerosene prices,” Europe’s biggest airline said on Wednesda

headlines.title: Average U.S. Gasoline Price Tops $4.50 to Near Four-Year High
headlines.summary: The national average price of gasoline in the United States has just topped $4.50 per gallon, the highest level since the middle of July 2022, according to data from GasBuddy, as the Iran war drains fuel inventories and sends crude prices higher. headlines.title: Pakistan Issues Emergency LNG Tender for Two Cargoes as Power Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Pakistan on Wednesday issued a tender seeking to urgently buy two LNG cargoes for delivery later this month as the country struggles to cope with a gas and power crisis amid disrupted LNG supplies from the Middle East.
